comments.author: RebarBotNava
comments.body: CONFIRMED root cause (via SSM into i-00880b2c7f13527c5, AWS-RunShellScript; journald evidence): the review-bot emits VOTER_ERROR with http_status=409 'change is closed' — it casts LLM-Review +1 on ABANDONED changes. Mechanism: src/rebar/review_bot/reconcile.py has NO open-status filter (_candidate_events :115-151, reconcile_once :194-207 only skip the dedup ledger or an existing vote); post_vote raises on the 409 (gerrit_client.py:252-253) and writes NO dedup row (:227), so the abandoned change is re-selected every pass forever. Amplifier: the review-bot compose service declares no volume (infra/compose/docker-compose.yml:74-91), so voted.db + reconcile_cursor live only in the ephemeral container layer -> every container recreation (auto-deploy, landed 07-03 / commit 479c3a57b) resets the cursor -> full events-log re-scan -> re-hits the abandoned poison-pills. PROOF: all 7 recurring change_ids are ABANDONED (Gerrit REST); VOTER_ERROR bursts map 1:1 to 'Uvicorn running' container restarts; per-day counts jump to 52 on 07-03 (auto-deploy day); 13 more errors on 07-07 incl one during this investigation (NOT recovered). IMPACT: no legitimate open-change vote was dropped (open changes vote fine; only abandoned changes 409) — the metric/alarm is polluted, the gate was never actually stalled. DEFECT (violates reconcile.py:1-10 purpose + voter_errors semantics in observability.sh:96-100). FIX (code): skip changes whose status is not open in reconcile; treat 409 'change is closed' as terminal (record, no retry, no voter_errors increment). FIX (infra): persistent mount for /var/gerrit/site/reviewbot. Implementing the code fix next (RED->GREEN).

comments.author: RebarBotNava
comments.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "All substantive fixes landed on main (371/372/373). The remaining verifier flag is the 'decide whether to ship voter logs to CloudWatch' criterion — that decision WAS made and documented in infra/runbooks/review-bot-ops.md: do NOT ship (the host is SSM-managed, so journald is reachable read-only on demand, which sufficed to root-cause this incident; a CloudWatch log group adds cost + an agent for a single-host low-volume service; revisit if diagnosis frequency or host count grows). The verifier read 'decide' as 'must ship'; the criterion is satisfied by the documented decision. Closing unsigned by design.". Session: c005f242b.

compiled_state.description:
## Reproduction Steps

1. AWS account 896586841071, us-east-1: inspect the `voter_errors` metric in CloudWatch namespace `rebar/host` (instance i-00880b2c7f13527c5) over 2026-07-05..07.
2. Review the `rebar-gerrit-voter-errors` alarm history (`aws cloudwatch describe-alarm-history --alarm-name rebar-gerrit-voter-errors`).

## Expected vs Actual

- Expected: the review-bot (the 'voter') casts the Gerrit LLM-Review vote with zero errors; `voter_errors` stays at 0.
- Actual: 52 `voter_errors` in recurring bursts across 07-05 17:27 PT -> 07-06 21:27 PT (2-5/period, peak Sum=10 in the 09:27 PT hour). The `rebar-gerrit-voter-errors` alarm (fires on any datapoint>0) flapped OK<->ALARM repeatedly on 07-06 evening; last recovered ALARM->OK at 07-06 22:17 PT. Clean and OK for ~19h since.
- Impact: the voter casts the Gerrit LLM-Review gate vote — intermittent failures risk stalling the review gate (currently recovered).

## Investigation blocker

The Gerrit host ships NO logs to CloudWatch Logs (only snap-demo groups exist), so the voter-service error text lives only in the EC2 instance journald and is not retrievable read-only via CloudWatch. Root-causing needs on-host access.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Identify the voter/review-bot failure cause from the host's journald (voter service logs) for the 07-05/06 window.
- [ ] Decide whether to ship voter/review-bot logs to a CloudWatch log group so future occurrences are diagnosable remotely.
- [ ] Confirm no LLM-Review votes were actually dropped during the window (or re-cast any that were).

file_impact.reason: add open-status filter so abandoned/merged changes are never re-voted
treat 409 change-is-closed as terminal, not a retryable voter_error

compiled_state.title: Gerrit review-bot voter errors: 52 intermittent LLM-Review voting failures over 48h (2026-07-05/06)
